Table tennis at theParisOlympicshas reached the knockout rounds for singles play, with men's and women's medals set to be handed out this weekend.

Felix Lebrun ofFrancewon again Thursday to book a spot in the semifinals. Kanak Jha became the first U.S. men's player to reach the quarterfinals, doing so in a tournament that has featured some surprises. World No. 1-ranked Wang Chuqin ofChinalost in the round of 32.

___

title: AP PHOTOS: Table tennis players at the Paris Olympics keep their eyes on the ball | The Independent
description: Table tennis at the Paris Olympics has reached the knockout rounds for singles play, with men's and women's medals set to be handed out this weekend.
